sections.paragraph: ναός, οῦ, ὁ [ναίω ‘inhabit’] temple Mt 23:16; Mk 14:58; J 2:20; Ac 17:24; 2 Th 2:4. The book of Rv ranges from ref. to a temple in general Rv 21:22; the temple in Jerusalem 11:1f; and a heavenly sanctuary, as metaphor of God’s end-time salvation 3:12; 7:15; 11:19; 15:5; 16:1, 17. In imagery J 2:19 (the narrator’s perspective on what the participants in the narrative understand as Jerusalem’s temple); 1 Cor 3:16f; 6:19; Eph 2:21.
